name: ppt-technical-playbook
description: PowerPoint skills for detailed technical playbooks, engineering deep dives, architecture reviews, and appendix-heavy decks.

interface.shortDescription: Detailed technical PowerPoint playbooks and engineering deep dives.
interface.longDescription: PPT Technical Playbook provides skills for highly detailed, evidence-led technical PowerPoint decks. It combines assertion-evidence slide design, architecture/playbook structure, appendix discipline, accessibility checks, and artifact-tool PowerPoint production through the Presentations plugin.
